productDisplayName: Fossil Men Marcus Traveller Brown Wallet
description: Crafted from genuine leather, this Midway 2 in 1 wallet from fossil is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed male. Fossil perfects this traditional accessory's foray into modern wardrobes with its classic techniques and innovative designs. Carry your monetary essentials with ease in this classic wallet. Comes in a vintage style tin.Dimensions: 9 cm x 12 cmOne main compartment in a smooth upper with stitch detailing and embossed branding Two slip pockets on both sides for coinsFour card holders on both sides of the walleta flap on the left with an id card holder and a pocket on both sidesCare Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
